'''[https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCe31NPEeRGO0hcznx6Tdb-g/ BattleGrounds Mobile India]''' to commemorate the launch of the title present the first BGMI tournament called "''' The Launch Party'''" . The tournament will feature professional players and streamers from India who will compete for a prize pool of ₹6,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} .

===Format===
'''''The Launch Party:''' 8th to 9th July, 2021.''
* ''18 Teams ''
* ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] ''
* ''7 Matches to be played over a period of 2 days (Including One Pan Fight).''
